title: Solicitation
description: An EDC public solicitation — a Request for Proposals (RFP), Request for Expressions of Interest (RFEI), Request for Qualifications (RFQ), or Request for Information (RFI). MODELED ENTITY: EDC posts open solicitations on edc.nyc but publishes NO Open Data dataset and NO API for them; there is no machine-readable feed of what EDC is soliciting. Schema reverse-engineered from the edc.nyc RFP listing.

solicitationId.description: EDC solicitation / RFP number or slug.

category.description: Subject category (e.g. Development, Construction, Professional Services, Real Estate).

relatedAssetId.description: PropertyAsset this solicitation concerns, if any.

documentUrl.description: Link to the solicitation document / listing on edc.nyc.
